channel.title: Photography on Jake Roggenbuck
channel.description: Recent content in Photography on Jake Roggenbuck

item.title: Photography
item.description: I’m currently using a Sony a6400 with a Sony FE 50mm f/1.

item.title: Exakta Lens on a Modern Sony Camera
item.description: Introduction # I had the crazy idea of attaching a vintage Exakta lens to my modern Sony a6400.
